name: atomic
description: An evidence-backed data substrate, parser runtime, deterministic identity-folding engine, and CLI powered by installable model packs.

scripts.test: node test.mjs && node test-parser.mjs && node test-fold.mjs && node test-cli.mjs
scripts.seed: node seeds/seed-a.mjs && node seeds/seed-b.mjs && node seeds/seed-c.mjs && node seeds/seed-d.mjs

comment: Zero required dependencies. `pg` is OPTIONAL — loaded only when the kernel uses the Postgres driver.
